abstract: Complete design system workflow orchestrating 5 phases: Discovery (context gathering), Aesthetic Direction (visual strategy), Typography (font pairing + scale), Color System (accessible palette + dark mode), and Tokens & Components (spacing, radius, shadows, breakpoints, component specs). Produces production-ready deliverables: CSS custom properties, Tailwind config extension, type scale table, color palette with contrast validation, spacing/radius/shadow tables, component token reference, and 02-DESIGN-SYSTEM.md documentation. Integrates aesthetic-direction, typography-pairing, and color-system skills. Cross-references brand-research for competitive analysis. Suitable for greenfield projects, design system overhauls, and multi-product consistency.
